channel.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
channel.description:
Hello guys !
As a junior, I've just discovered Frontity. I created my first project, everything was fine but I don't know why, **my browser stopped to update my localhost:3000 page**. I changed the content, I saved many times my files and nothing changes when I try to launch my server with **npx frontity dev.**
What I'm using as tools : - Editor : Webstorm - Terminal : iTerm - Browser : Chrome
What I tried to solve this : - stop the server with ctrl+c and relaunch with npx frontity dev - close my editor, open the project is visual code and save it again. - restart the computer - tried on another port like localhost:4000
here a screenshot of what I get when I launch my server : ![Capture d’écran 2020-09-10 à 14.53.15|690x464](upload://2AMwDjB7LhFJgxLwXhaoP3EoFg4.png)
Thank you so much for your help girls/guys !

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: mauricia
item.description:
I was hoping to use this framework, but what am I missing? I’m following the initial tutorial and I experienced the same issue detailed here when I introduced dayjs to format the post date. I removed the formatted date and it still does not work. I understand creating another project could work but that implies this is not a production-ready framework. Is that an accurate conclusion?

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
@Pablo one thing I noticed is that all the package.json files in the project’s node_modules have a _where path eg

"_where": "D:\\dev\\test.io\\node_modules\\webpack-bundle-analyzer",

inside the file D:\dev\test.io\node_modules\webpack-bundle-analyzer\node_modules\commander\package.json

and the same in all other packages

if I move or rename the project folder, is there a chance this may cause the webpack process to break? I did a full diff on an old project and a new project and literally the only difference I could find were these package.json values

[update]
tried renaming a new project’s folder. did not break it.

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
see here: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode - #9 by codemonkeynorth

only solution I found was create a new project and replace the theme with your old one

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: jct.sylvain
item.description:
Hello . With a new project, everything works fine. I guess I’ll keep going on this new one and keep an eye on all my production steps in case of the issue occurs again.

Thank you anyway

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hey @jct.sylvain can you try to create a new frontity project and check if the problem persists?

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated

item.title: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
item.dc:creator: jct.sylvain
item.description:
Hello guys !

As a junior, I’ve just discovered Frontity. I created my first project, everything was fine but I don’t know why, my browser stopped to update my localhost:3000 page. I changed the content, I saved many times my files and nothing changes when I try to launch my server with npx frontity dev.

What I’m using as tools :

  • Editor : Webstorm
  • Terminal : iTerm
  • Browser : Chrome

What I tried to solve this :

  • stop the server with ctrl+c and relaunch with npx frontity dev
  • close my editor, open the project is visual code and save it again.
  • restart the computer
  • tried on another port like localhost:4000

here a screenshot of what I get when I launch my server :

Thank you so much for your help girls/guys !

Read full topic
item.source: Localhost not refreshing and not updated
